final_output: status='success' summary='AIエージェント展開が急増しており、新規トークンが市場で注目を集めています。特にAI関連トークンが好調で、市場センチメントは慎重ながら楽観的です。' virtuals_payload={'trends': {'ai_agents': ['Luna', 'Sol'], 'crypto_market': {'bitcoin': 'stable', 'ai_tokens': 'outperforming'}, 'nft_trends': [{'name': 'Moonbirds (MOONBIRD)', 'floor_price': '1.14 ETH', '24h_change': '+14.89%'}, {'name': 'Fidenza by Tyler Hobbs (BLOCKS)', 'floor_price': '17.68 ETH', '24h_change': '+3.10%'}, {'name': 'Bitcoin Shrooms (BITCOINSHROOMS)', 'floor_price': '0.34 BTC', '24h_change': '+1.60%'}, {'name': 'Solana Monkey Business (SMB)', 'floor_price': '19.38 SOL', '24h_change': '-0.62%'}, {'name': 'Lil Pudgys (LilPudgys)', 'floor_price': '0.51 ETH', '24h_change': '-1.81%'}], 'token_trends': [{'name': 'Definitive (EDGE)', 'price': '$0.276', '24h_change': '+171.16%'}, {'name': 'Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)', 'price': '$0.0068', '24h_change': '-1.01%'}, {'name': 'Fabric Protocol (ROBO)', 'price': '$0.051', '24h_change': '+5.43%'}, {'name': 'Hyperliquid (HYPE)', 'price': '$31.12', '24h_change': '-5.29%'}, {'name': 'Grass (GRASS)', 'price': '$0.289', '24h_change': '-5.59%'}], 'market_categories': [{'name': 'DEX Aggregator', 'market_cap_change': '+6.71%'}, {'name': 'Layer 1 (L1)', 'market_cap_change': '-1.35%'}, {'name': 'AI Applications', 'market_cap_change': '-5.10%'}]}} next_action_suggestion='AI関連トークンとNFTの動向をさらに分析し、特に急成長中のDefinitive (EDGE)とMoonbirds (MOONBIRD)に焦点を当てた投資戦略を検討する。'
